entry.title: Automation for cheque bounce process in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Sabari is in the wholesale and distribution industry and has collection data across various branches across the states of Kerala and Tamil Nadu. The collection data is posted daily via API calls. Some of the payments are received via Cheques and they are posted similarly to the other payment receipts. The Customer account will be cleared after the payment is received.

After the checks are presented to the Bank, in a few cases, the checks may bounce. This data has to be reversed in the customer Accounts receivable that has already been posted and cleared in SAP. We have to reset and reverse the cleared items for a case with a bounced check. We have an API available to reverse the posted documents, but there is no option to reset the cleared items with this API. Currently, Sabari is managing this manually and they have a volume of 75-100 cheques per day across all the branches, which may be bounced.

APIs API Management SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation 

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: need help with Electronic Bank Statement MT940, problem with amount in file
entry.content:
Hi expert, i need help with my MT940 file.

I'm trying to configure Electronic Bank Statement using MT940 file. i've already done configuration, and ready to upload the file. The file uploaded succesfully, but the amount posted to SAP is the wrong one. i figure the problem is from MT940 file itself.

Amount from MT 940 is "25000000 (25.000.000) rupiah". meanwhile, the real amount is only 250.000 rupiah.  How can i divide the amount by /100 so the amount posted to SAP is 250.000? or can i use string so SAP will read two last zeros as coma?

Nb: my sistem define IDR is without comma.

Thanks a lot for your help!

entry.title: BUDGET EXCEEDED - EMAIL CUSTOMIZATION
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

When the budget is exceeded, one email should be sent. this is the email and i want to change it using dynamic values. ( Please contact Oder &owner& (Name)).

 

Can any one guide me how to use se61 to update the email or any other road.

Thanks !

entry.title: Clarification on Time Conversion and Material Cost Calculation (second to milliseconds conversion)
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are maintaining very low timing in the routing, which is typically in milliseconds. As a result, the material cost is also expected to be a small amount. However, since the system is calculating the time in milliseconds and the cost is already low, it appears that the values are being rounded off to zero in the costing.

We would like to understand where this rounding is happening, why it's occurring, and what the root cause might be.

SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP Product Lifecycle Costing, cloud edition 

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Net expense is less than advance amount in Travel Management.
entry.content:
In the scenario where net expense is less than advance amount and difference amount is to be recovered from Employee.

Net amount recoverable need to be posted in GL# XXXXXX – Emp Various deduction account.

Currently is also posting in Vendor as Employee A/C.

Experts need your inputs.

entry.title: Recommended RAR Structures in interface component configuration
entry.content:
Dear community

Use Case: Request for Support on Recommended Standard Structures for RAR Configuration of Interface Components

Objective:
To request guidance or best practice recommendations on standard structures for configuring SAP RAR (Revenue Accounting and Reporting) interface components, specifically in scenarios involving provider contracts with time-based fulfillment obligations that require revenue deferral based on the contract billing date.

Background:
In the current project, we are working with provider contracts where services are fulfilled over a time period—such as maintenance agreements or subscription-based offerings. These contracts trigger billing at a certain point in time (contract start or milestone), but the revenue must be deferred and recognized over the duration of the service.

A key challenge lies in ensuring that the source system (e.g., SD or a custom billing engine) delivers all required data elements in the correct structure, so that SAP RAR can correctly:

  • Identify the performance obligation as time-based

  • Determine the start and end date for revenue recognition

  • Map billing triggers correctly to the fulfillment schedule

  • Avoid inconsistencies in item class derivation or missing technical keys

Request:
We are seeking recommended standard interface structures, including:

  • Minimum required fields from source (e.g., POB ID, fulfillment type, contract dates, revenue start/end dates, billing date)

  • Structure and mapping logic examples for time-based POBs

  • Any available SAP Notes, Best Practices, or Implementation Guidelines dealing with time-based revenue deferrals for provider contracts

This request is especially relevant as the absence of clear guidance here is currently blocking successful mapping and downstream posting in RAR.

Many thanks in advance

Marvin Brown

entry.title: FSCM CLM: API to update Cash Flow Analyzer (FQM table)
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a client who demands to update cash flow with external data from the legacy system.

I tested API CASHFLOW_IN but it is returning error: II_FQM_ESR_CASH_FLOW_IN is not proxy class.  It seems that proxy is obsolete.  I found a link with this api released for 2023 FPS03, so it's should be work for me.  sap.s4:apiResource:OP_CASHFLOW_IN:v1

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_CASHFLOW_IN/overview?ReleaseInfo=2023%20FPS03

I suggested using memo record upload functionality but the cliente did not agree.

Thanks in advance.  Any help will be great.

Best Regards

RL

entry.title: 資産エクスプローラ機能の損失欄の値について
entry.content:
資産エクスプローラ機能で表示されている「損失」欄が、どのように計算されているか知りたい。

（テーブルデータのどの項目から計算されているのか）

資産エクスプローラは、ANLCのデータから表示していると理解しているが、「損失」欄をどのように計算されているのか分からず教えて頂きたい。

entry.title: Override Booking Text in FAGLF101 and F.50
entry.content:
Dear experts,

is it possible to override the system-defined posting text (ACDOCA-SGTXT/BSEG-SGTXT) for transactions F.50 and FAGLF101? I don't think this is possible in standard Customizing, but perhaps there's an exit or something similar?

Thanks and best regards
Markus

entry.title: Clarification on TDS Threshold Configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public
entry.content:
We would like to confirm whether TDS threshold-based deduction (as per Indian statutory requirements) can be configured and automated in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment.

Specifically, we are looking to configure:

  • Minimum invoice-level threshold (e.g., ₹30,000)

  • Cumulative yearly threshold (e.g., ₹1,00,000 per vendor per financial year)

  • Automatic TDS deduction once thresholds are breached

  • TDS applicability based on section-wise rates (e.g., 194C, 194J, etc.)

Kindly confirm the below:

  1. Can these thresholds be maintained in the WHT Type/Code configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

  2. Is cumulative threshold tracking supported for each vendor annually?

  3. Do we need to activate any additional scope items or business configurations?

  4. Could you share the list of relevant SSCUIs or apps for maintaining this setup?

Appreciate your support on this. Please let us know if any additional steps or approvals are required from our side.

entry.title: SAP Treasury
entry.content:
Good Day to all.

I am a Junior SAP FICO Consultant. I have basic project experience, and I want to expand my skill set to more SAP modules or at least learn about more and prepare so that I will have theoretical knowledge before I am able to work on said areas.

One such Module I'm interested in is the SAP Treasury module. The problem I face is I am able to get related resources for the same SAP Learning Journey, but I need video tutorials or other type of materials for me to emulate the hands-on experience, something like capstone projects for SAP Treasury. Are there any such tutorials in YouTube or any other source available for free.

Regards,

Danies

entry.title: Published API for simulating supplier invoice posting in S4/HANA private edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

Are there any published APIs or ways where we can simulate the posting of a supplier Invoice in MIRO or FB60 or ? Our client has an external system through which the supplier invoice data would be posted and prior to that would want to simulate the posting. Any suggestions would be really appreciated.

Regards,
Shravan Chintapatla

entry.title: Long- And Short-Term in Purchase Order Deferrals (POAC)
entry.content:
Gurus,

I would like to ask whether it is possible to configure the split of deferred accruals into current and long-term portions in POAC (Purchase Order Accruals)?
I am looking for functionality similar to manual accruals, as described in SAP Note 2582883 - S4TWL - Manual Accruals (Accrual Engine) → Manual Accruals - Additional Documentation (link), specifically on page 279: Invoice Deferral – Long- and Short-Term Deferrals.

Is such a configuration supported in POAC? Or is there any recommended approach to achieve this split?

Thank you in advance for your guidance

entry.title: BR J_1BBR20: Mapping Field `ITEMS_E-FILLER19` to `FEBEP-KIDNO` in Electronic Bank Statement
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm evaluating modify FEBEP Mapping.  The FEB* tables are populated when importing the electronic statement, in This is BR localization, layout CNAB_240, imported through report RFEBKA00 > PERFORM format_itau(j_1bbr20) > J_1BBR20.

I am particularly interested in the information located in positions 202 to 240 of the bank statement file. During debugging, I discovered that this data is initially stored in the BDATA_AP string and later used to populate the ITEMS_E internal table. The specific value I need is in the 'ITEMS_E-FILLER19' field. However, I could not find a standard table where this field is stored. I was considering use FEBEP-KIDNO for this, because the mapping of the FEBEP table is done in perform insert_febep_e, I have 3 fields with the same information:
febep-chect = items_e-xblnr
febep-kidno = items_e-xblnr
febep-xblnr = items_e-xblnr

Is this replacement possible? Has anyone implemented a BAdI or user exit to achieve this?

Thanks in advance for any help or guidance!

Best Regards,

Att

RL

entry.title: Accounting doc for cancel invoice does not have downpayment and not getting cleared.
entry.content:
Original invoice has downpayment; it is cancelled the cancel document has downpayment but its accounting document generated is not cleared because it does not have downpayment.

Any solution?

entry.title: Hi Could you please let me how to handle cash discount explicitly to that FM.
entry.content:
Hi

Currently i am working on customer clearing the mentioned FM but I am unable clear cash discount amount.

Could you please help me

entry.title: Manual exchange rate when clearing 2 open items one in EUR and one in MAD
entry.content:
Hello Experts!!

For a bank GL account managed in MAD (local currency), I need to clear 2 open items : Item 1 with posting date 31122024 in MAD currency, Item 2 with posting date 28022025 in EUR currency. In FBL3N the difference between the two posts is of 0,24 MAD.

Now the business need to clear these two posts with today's date (the system uses today as exchange date), but the difference we have in FBL3N is not the same in F-03 (259 MAD in F-03). Is there a way to allow business use the exchange rate of 28.02.2025 instead of today's date or let them type a manual exchange ?

I tried FIORI app F1579 et F-04 but seem don't cover this need. 022025 period is closed.

Thank you in advance!!!

entry.title: Withholding Tax is calculated on payments and Downpayment Separately
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I hope you’re doing well.

 

We’re encountering an inconsistency in withholding tax calculation:

 

  •  

  • Threshold rule: For amounts up to ₹X→ 0% tax. For amounts above → 10% tax.

  •  

  • The down‑payments from vendors are being taxed separately and not aggregated with full payment amounts.

  •  

  • In contrast, regular invoice payments follow the correct threshold logic.

 

This discrepancy between down‑payments and invoice payments is causing incorrect tax deductions.

 

Could you please advise on:

 

  1.  

  2. Correct configuration for threshold-based tax accumulation across both payment types?

  3.  

  4. Settings or transaction keys to ensure down‑payments and invoices are treated in a single accumulation cycle?

  5.  

  6. Any known workarounds or patches to align the behavior?

 

Your guidance on aligning the issue across both transaction types would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance for your support!

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Posting failed: Unable to post using posting rule F020 – Bill of Exchange Payable.
entry.content:
Dear expert,

I attempted to create a manual bank statement and selected F020 (Bill of Exchange Payable) as the manual transaction in one of the line items. According to the SAP Help Portal, this posting rule is classified as a one-step posting, meaning it should only affect the bank ledger.

However, upon clicking the Post button, the following information message appeared:

Message: Statement posted: 0 items completed, 1 item not completed

No error or warning messages were displayed within the bank statement itself, so I’m unclear why the posting could not be completed successfully.

Could you kindly advise on the cause or necessary action?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, 

HY

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance   FIN (Finance)

entry.title: <ReqdExctnDt> has to pick Today + 1 day in payment file
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

Requirement is - Tag <ReqdExctnDt> has to pick today +1day. Currently the tag is picking the payment file generated date. It has to add + 1 day. 

I have configured as Below.

SSCUI ID: 101045

App: Enter amounts for payment program.

DME File(XML).

Not getting +1day in the Payment file

 

System: SAP S4 hana public cloud.

Please let me know why its not picking + 1day in the tag, should I make the changes in the configuration/did I missed to configure anything. 

 

Thanks..
